sankey.title: Mass balance
sankey.subtitle: Where every kilo of parchment went
sankey.balanced: Balanced. Every kilo is accounted for.
sankey.unbalanced: {kg} kg unaccounted, over the {ceiling} kg ceiling.
sankey.pendingGreen: Record the final pass or finalize the run to close the balance.
sankey.ceilingNote: Loss ceiling {kg} kg, derived from the variety yield curve.

chain.title: Machine chain
chain.subtitle: Parchment runs the huller, polisher and graders in order

byproducts.title: Byproducts
byproducts.subtitle: Each stream is its own sellable, traceable lot

empty.title: Nothing milled on this run yet
empty.description: Record the first machine pass to start the closed mass balance.

record.massHint: Clean output plus reject can never exceed the input.
record.byproductHint: Mints a sellable, traceable byproduct lot and draws from the parchment mass.
record.closedRun: This run is {status}. Passes can only be recorded while it is open.
record.passContinuity: Input is pre-filled from the prior pass output so the clean stream stays continuous.

errors.passNo: Pass number must be a whole number of 1 or more.
errors.machine: Pick a machine for this pass.
errors.inputPositive: Input must be greater than 0 kg.
errors.massBalance: Clean output plus reject cannot exceed the input.
